title: Tau2-Bench Leaderboard Submission
description: Schema for submitting model results to the tau2-bench leaderboard

model_name.description: Name of the model being evaluated

model_organization.description: Organization or company that developed the model

submitting_organization.description: Organization that actually ran the evaluation and submitted the results

submission_date.description: Date of submission in YYYY-MM-DD format

email.description: Contact email for questions about this submission

is_new.description: Whether this model should be highlighted as new on the leaderboard

submission_type.description: Type of submission: 'standard' uses the default tau2-bench scaffold (base LLM + standard tools/prompts), 'custom' uses modified scaffolds (multi-model routers, additional tools, custom prompting, etc.). Custom submissions require detailed methodology documentation.

modality.description: Evaluation modality: 'text' for standard text-based half-duplex evaluation, 'voice' for audio-native full-duplex evaluation

trajectories_available.description: Whether trajectory files are available for this submission

trajectory_files.description: Mapping of domain name to trajectory filename in the trajectories/ directory

airline.description: Filename of the airline trajectory file

retail.description: Filename of the retail trajectory file

telecom.description: Filename of the telecom trajectory file

banking_knowledge.description: Filename of the banking_knowledge trajectory file

references.description: Links to papers, blog posts, documentation, or other resources about this model

title.description: Title or description of the reference

voice_config.description: Voice-specific configuration for audio-native evaluations. Required when modality is 'voice'.

tick_duration_seconds.description: Duration of each simulation tick in seconds

user_tts_provider.description: User simulator TTS provider and model (e.g. 'elevenlabs/eleven_v3')

methodology.description: Information about how the evaluation was conducted

tau2_bench_version.description: Version of tau2-bench used for evaluation

user_simulator.description: For text submissions: model name (e.g. 'gpt-4.1-2025-04-14'). For voice submissions: version identifier (e.g. 'v1.0') anchored to git tag voice-user-sim-<version>. Null if unknown.

notes.description: Additional notes about the evaluation methodology

modified_prompts.description: Whether any modifications were made to user simulator or agent prompts. Null if unknown.

omitted_questions.description: Whether any questions/tasks were omitted from the evaluation. Null if unknown.

cost.description: Average cost in USD to run one trajectory in this domain (optional)

banking_knowledge_results.description: Results for the banking_knowledge domain. Requires a retrieval_config field specifying the retrieval method used.

cost.description: Average cost in USD to run one trajectory in this domain (optional)

retrieval_config.description: Retrieval method used for knowledge base access (e.g., 'terminal', 'text-emb-3-large', 'qwen3-emb', 'bm25')
